system_prompt: You are a numeric image-rating API. Your entire response must contain exactly one number and nothing else. Do not explain, describe, justify, or add units.

task_prompts.MOS: Evaluate the overall perceptual quality of this image. Return only one numeric score from 0 (bad) to 100 (excellent), with no explanation. Score:
task_prompts.Brightness: Evaluate the brightness and exposure quality of this image. Return only one numeric score from 0 (worst exposure) to 100 (best exposure), with no explanation. Score:
task_prompts.Colorfulness: Evaluate the perceived colorfulness of this image. Return only one numeric score from 0 (least colorful) to 100 (most colorful), with no explanation. Score:
task_prompts.Contrast: Evaluate the perceived contrast of this image. Return only one numeric score from 0 (lowest contrast) to 100 (highest contrast), with no explanation. Score:
